name: Vanguarr
overview: Surfaces per-user Suggested Movies and Suggested Shows views from Vanguarr inside Jellyfin.
description: Connects Jellyfin to Vanguarr's suggestions API, resolves ranked suggestions to existing library items, and exposes them as native user-specific Jellyfin views for movies and shows without extra libraries or symlink trees.

versions.changelog:
- Keeps the native shared Suggested Movies and Suggested Shows folders but makes them advertise themselves to the stock Jellyfin client as normal collection folders.
- Preserves per-user personalization inside the folder query so each user still gets their own ranked results.
- Keeps the stock-client-focused setup with no extra Jellyfin plugin dependency.
